# 储能技术

Energy storage is key to large-scale renewable deployment. [[battery-technology]] (lithium-ion, solid-state) is most flexible. Pumped hydro is the most mature large-scale storage. Compressed air and flywheels suit specific scenarios. [[hydrogen-fuel-cell]] serves as long-duration storage. [[smart-grid]] needs multiple storage technologies.
